task_description: Add PDF download for financial reports, Firebase Cloud Messaging push notifications, and make the app a PWA installable on Android and iOS - following the hr-legal-app reference patterns

verification.summary: All files pass syntax validation: manifest.json (valid JSON), sw.js (node -c pass), firebase-messaging-sw.js (syntax OK), keuangan-app.js (node -c pass), index.html (all meta tags present). No test infrastructure exists in this project. No Docker/build system.
